init.title: Lemonade Server options
init.description: Configure Lemonade Server request settings and media or speech default models.

data_description.max_history: Maximum number of non-system chat history messages to send to Lemonade each turn. 0 sends all history.
data_description.keep_alive: Duration in seconds for Lemonade to keep the model active. Leave blank for the Lemonade server default. -1 = indefinite, 0 = never.
